revision.comment: Undid revision 647355359 by [[Special:Contributions/EEng|EEng]] ([[User talk:EEng|talk]]) except it doesn't seem to work, and being too frightened I've messed something up, I now revert
Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

revision.comment: Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?

Changed protection level for "[[Template:R]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 4000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

revision.comment: Undid revision 647355359 by [[Special:Contributions/EEng|EEng]] ([[User talk:EEng|talk]]) except it doesn't seem to work, and being too frightened I've messed something up, I now revert
Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

revision.comment: Undid revision 647355359 by [[Special:Contributions/EEng|EEng]] ([[User talk:EEng|talk]]) except it doesn't seem to work, and being too frightened I've messed something up, I now revert
Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates

Undid revision 1041299176 by [[Special:Contributions/EEng|EEng]] ([[User talk:EEng|talk]]) Putting back in for more testing after commenting out support section stuff from sub-template. Does no longer cause post-expand size limit issue according to testing so far. This would reenable all features except for the support section feature. Let's see if this works for now. If not, we can revert again.
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:R: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (over 1000 transclusions) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Changed protection level for "[[Template:R]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 4000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see
updated from sandbox, thereby now fully supporting singular/plural parameters and style parameter

revision.comment: Introduce p=, p1= etc as alternatives to page=
add synonyms per Talk (praying I got all the {s and }s right)
of course I fucked it up
there's something weird going on -- why isn't the documentation purging?
adding aliases for "group" to optionally further shorten coding

Swapped parameter evaluation so that longer parameter names have priority over shorter ones (the usual order we evaluate such sets of alternative parameters). Added name/n parameters for symmetry with the other parameter names.
Added reference parameter name for compatibility with other templates
mute unused parameters to avoid problems when combining unnamed references defined through different means
support for "page needed" and wrapping per template rp

revision.comment: Sorry, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], again reverting, for now, to August 29. As of today invocations of {r} jam up against text that follows without space. Actually, not sure {r} itself is the cause of this but we'll see

Undid revision 1042740535 by [[Special:Contributions/EEng|EEng]] ([[User talk:EEng|talk]]) Well, [[User:Matthiaspaul]], that didn't fix it, but there's still something wrong. I fear this code may be approaching the complexity tipping point
